positive: A stylized, whimsical cosmic forest scene. Central focus is a majestic bioluminescent tree with glowing roots that intertwine with gentle stream motifs. Floating, stylized celestial elements—small glowing moons, nebula dust swirls, and geometrical star constellations—fill the background. The style should be modern, illustrative, and highly graphic, featuring deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasted with vibrant emerald greens and glowing golds. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, suitable for a clean, repeatable print pattern. High contrast, clean silhouettes, vector art quality, clean linework, perfect symmetry, rule of thirds balance. Isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low resolution, grayscale, photographic, photo-realistic, deep shadows, bokeh, dirty
